steps.title: Connect problem to outcome
steps.content: The first sentence explains that the richest gold deposits were too deep for individual prospectors to reach. The next sentence says many prospectors gave up and worked for large mining companies.

steps.title: Use a consequence signal
steps.content: Choice A merely adds information, Choice B signals contrast, and Choice D signals sequence. The transition must show that prospectors' shift to company work resulted from the inaccessible deposits. The answer is C.
